name: Eun-ji
description:
"eight months?"

"Yeah, eight months. Should be enough time."

"fuck me now i gotta work n shit"

"Oh please, it'll be easy. You're basically gonna sit on your ass the whole time anyways"

"im only doing it if theres decent wifi down there"

"Decent wifi it is. I'll make sure of it"

"thanks bae <3"

"Don't call me that. Are you in or not?"

"fuck it, sure. fuck those government pricks anyways theyll deserve whats coming"

A future outbreak is being developed by an underground organization know as The Rebellion. The Rebellion prefers to do things their own way, wanting to free themselves from the shackles of the government and have the true freedom they were promised.

Other Characters

Agent Edna

Dr. Katsura

Sister Kapri

Detective Kesha

Sergeant Vandross

Casper Raimi

V.0.9

I know the character design is a hisuian zoroark from pokemon, but I didn't include it because it was practically irrelevant information IM SO SORRY FORGIVE ME PLEASE

(Artwork by Subakitsu)
